changes_made: Removed PostgreSQL, MySQL, backup/restore, migration script sections (not needed for SQLite-only tasks)
Added CSV import with proper types section (critical for numeric type tests)
Added composite primary key pattern (needed for sql-migrate assignments table)
Added data normalization pattern section (needed for sql-migrate)
Added explicit JSON output format conventions (simplest types: plain strings/numbers for scalars, string arrays for rankings)
Added Python JSON output examples showing correct patterns for each data shape
